lakebase-release-workflows.description: Opinionated branching + release methodology for Lakebase-paired projects. Use when designing a project's branch layout, cutting a release candidate, promoting to production, rolling back, or asking 'where should this work happen?' Encodes the prod / staging / {feature,test,uat,perf} convention and the cut-RC / regression-test / cut-prod-backup / migrate-prod release flow.

lakebase-scm-workflows.description: Opinionated git-Lakebase branch-pairing workflows. Use when scaffolding a Lakebase-paired project, creating/deleting Lakebase branches in lockstep with git branches, diffing parent-aware schemas, opening or merging PRs that touch Lakebase, or running the same operations the lakebase-scm-extension exposes in VS Code.
